message:
test(vendored): add 29 property-based tests for vendored compatibility module (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Cover WeztermVersion::parse determinism, whitespace trimming, commit
extraction invariants (lowercase, min-length, hex-letter, pure-numeric
rejection), VendoredCompatibilityStatus serde roundtrip and snake_case,
VendoredCompatibilityReport field preservation and skip_serializing_if,
VendoredWeztermMetadata defaults, and compatibility_report robustness.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
